data.name: Love Lock
data.detailed_description:
CONTENT WARNING

This game deals with mature themes and is not suitable for minors. Players may find the content to be disturbing, unethical or triggering. It contains, fictional depictions of Violence, Gore, Consensual and non-Consensual sex, Murder, self harm and suicide. Player discretion is advised. For the full list of trigger warnings, please below.

ABOUT

Jump into the kinky world of Love Lock where someone's lurking around every corner. This horror erotic story features around fetishes and elements of BDSM. Play as yourself while you do your best to navigate your way through these difficult situations and see if you can manage to survive. 

Love Lock is an immersive choose your own adventure erotic horror game where choices matter. 

FEATURES

  • 8 Character routes (1 Hidden one)

  • 343,400 words of in-game text, roughly 50 hours of game play

  • Quick time events/Mini-games

  • Animated Sprites

  • Partial voice acting

  • Choose your own name

  • Choose your own pronoun he/she/they

  • Choose your own genitalia and chest

  • 1472+ Choices, each choice dramatically changing the story.

  • 298 Endings and Ending collection page

  • 169 CG's/Animated CG's

  • 137 Backgrounds

  • 138 In game achievements

  • Soon to be available in Chinese, Russian and Spanish (Not yet though)

FULL LIST OF WARNINGS

Abduction, Kidnapping. Stalking, Blackmail, Fictional Revenge Porn, Drugs, Aggressive behavior, Interrogation, Bondage, Stockholm syndrome, Depictions of mental illness, Fictional Non-Consensual sex/Rape, Necrophilia, Consensual Sex, Verbal abuse, Violence, Physical abuse, Choking, Gun Violence, Knife violence, Murder, Graphic imagery/Gore, Bone-breaking, Dismemberment, Disfiguration, Mutilation, Starvation, Poisoning, Self harm, Suicide/Hanging,

This game has both heterosexual as well as homosexual content, you can choose who you play as but you can't change the characters around you. 

This game is a dark fantasy, if you are not comfortable with any of the content in this game then please do not play it. If you are triggered by this content then please do not play it. This game is designed to thrill not harm people. 

CONTENT OF INTEREST

Yandere, Foot, Master/Sub, Pet play, Gags, Abduction, Fear play, Electric shock play, Flogging, Spanking, Stalking, Bondage, Collars/Leash, Nipple clamps, Anal, Penetration, Oral, Fictional Non-Consensual, Slapping, Punishments, Saint Andrews Cross, Sex Swings, Handcuffs, Tasers, Dildos, Vibrators, Breath play/Choking, Edging, Masks, Predator/Prey, Voyeurism.

data.short_description: Stalked, loved, abducted. it's only a matter of time before he gets you and he WILL get you, or else another will. The question is, will you escape? Or submit?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.9
  • 處理器: Intel and Apple Silicon processors
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
